news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: DeFiLlama数据显示，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要受新晋DEX交易量增长推动。
news.summary_en: Solana’s total DeFi TVL rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume on new DEXs, according to DeFiLlama data.

news.title_en: Cardano Unveils Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队公布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将增强智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released Plutus V4 roadmap, targeting mainnet in 2026 Q3, enabling stronger smart contract capabilities and lower fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Chains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism，扩展跨链能力。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s cross-chain protocol CCIP now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding interoperability across major networks.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup Layer2扩容
news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Dev Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会发布草案，提议基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2方案，以降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation research group released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution aimed at reducing fees for small transactions.
